allow: Bash(cd D:/Projects/uigen && NODE_OPTIONS="--require ./node-compat.cjs" npx next dev --turbopack)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Create a simple pricing card component"}]}' \\
  --max-time 60 2>&1 | head -200)

Bash(curl -v -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Create a simple pricing card component"}]}' \\
  --max-time 60 2>&1 | tail -100)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Create a simple pricing card component"}],"files":{}}' \\
  --max-time 60 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Create a simple pricing card component"}],"files":{}}' \\
  --max-time 90 2>&1 | grep -E '"file_text"|"args"' | head -20)
